summary: Tested all 10 new features: settings tab, save settings, question image upload, category image upload, category edit buttons, dark mode toggle, homepage load, point button colors, GET/POST settings APIs.
critical_code_review_comments: Category edit buttons (✎) in sidebar exist but lack data-testid attributes (title='تعديل' only). Minor - doesn't affect functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tested features PASS. Settings tab has default-timer-input, word-timer-300/600/900, save-settings-btn all working with toast. Question form has question-image-upload button. Category new form has cat-image-upload button. Dark mode toggle (data-testid=dark-mode-toggle) works in GameBoard toggling dark/light mode. Point buttons 300/600/900 use gold/warm gradient colors (not white). Backend GET/PUT /api/settings both work correctly (PUT requires admin JWT). Game flow: /setup -> /categories -> /game all functional.

test_results.1_settings_tab: PASS - tab-settings, default-timer-input, word-timer-300/600/900, save-settings-btn all present
test_results.2_save_settings_toast: PASS - Toast shown and button changes to 'تم الحفظ!' after save
test_results.3_question_image_upload: PASS - data-testid=question-image-upload found in question form
test_results.4_category_image_upload: PASS - data-testid=cat-image-upload found in new category form
test_results.5_category_edit_buttons: PASS - ✎ edit buttons with title='تعديل' present for all categories (no data-testid)
test_results.6_dark_mode_toggle: PASS - data-testid=dark-mode-toggle works, toggles dark/light background
test_results.8_point_button_colors: PASS - 300 uses gold gradient (B8860B->E8C026), 600 uses warm brown, 900 uses dark red
test_results.9_post_settings: PASS - PUT /api/settings returns 200 with admin JWT
test_results.10_get_settings: PASS - GET /api/settings returns correct settings object
